description: Selected media appearances, written commentary, professional reports, university outputs, research publications, and research translation work.
notes: Merged from current Wix CMS exports and a first-pass verification search. The ten most recent research publications are included as Research Publications. Items without public URLs remain visible as disabled cards until links are confirmed.

outputs.title: Long-Term Performance Trajectories in Classic Powerlifting: An Exploratory Analysis of Competition Data from 6,506 Athletes
outputs.description: Exploratory analysis of long-term powerlifting performance trajectories using competition data from 6,506 athletes.

outputs.title: It’s More Than Motivation: Understanding Women’s Exercise Journeys
outputs.description: Research identifying emotional, social, and practical barriers to long-term health behaviour and exercise participation.

outputs.title: The Evolution of Normative Strength Values in Powerlifting from 2000 to 2024: A Retrospective, Cross-Sectional Analysis
outputs.source: The Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
outputs.description: Retrospective cross-sectional analysis examining how normative strength values in powerlifting changed between 2000 and 2024.

outputs.title: Nutrition in CrossFit® – scientific evidence and practical perspectives: a systematic scoping review
outputs.source: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
outputs.description: Systematic scoping review summarising scientific evidence and practical perspectives on nutrition in CrossFit®.

outputs.title: Normative data for the squat, bench press and deadlift exercises in powerlifting: Data from 809,986 competition entries
outputs.source: Journal of Science and Medicine in Sport
outputs.description: Large-scale normative dataset for squat, bench press and deadlift performance in powerlifting using 809,986 competition entries.

outputs.title: How technological impacts on performance have been managed in elite sport: a powerlifting example
outputs.description: Applied physiology commentary using powerlifting to examine how technology-related performance changes have been managed in elite sport.

outputs.title: Injury Profiles of Elite, Semielite, and Recreational Golfers, and Their Associated Risk Factors: A Systematic Review
outputs.source: The Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
outputs.description: Systematic review examining injury profiles and associated risk factors across elite, semielite and recreational golfers.

outputs.title: Powerlifting participation and engagement across all ages: A retrospective, longitudinal, population analysis with comparison to community strength norms
outputs.source: International Journal of Sports Science & Coaching
outputs.description: Retrospective longitudinal population analysis of powerlifting participation and engagement across age groups, compared with community strength norms.

outputs.title: Athlete Impairments in Paralympic Sports
outputs.source: American Journal of Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation
outputs.description: Research publication focused on athlete impairments in Paralympic sport classification and participation contexts.

outputs.title: How Do Intracompetition Strategies Differ Between Para Powerlifting Podium and Nonpodium Athletes? A Retrospective, Cross-Sectional Analysis
outputs.source: The Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
outputs.description: Retrospective cross-sectional analysis comparing intracompetition strategies between podium and nonpodium Para powerlifting athletes.

outputs.title: UniSC academic steers team to its first Queensland Q-Clash wheelchair AFL premiership
outputs.description: External media profile on wheelchair AFL, coaching, leadership, and community sport.

outputs.title: The Health Benefits of Muscle with Dan van den Hoek
outputs.description: Podcast discussion explaining the why and how of strength training and muscle health.

outputs.title: Lessons from the Para-powerlifters
outputs.description: ABC science communication segment on strength, para-powerlifting, and how strength can be measured.

outputs.title: F1 Sports Drivers Fitness
outputs.description: Radio segment discussing the physical demands, training, and performance requirements of Formula 1 drivers.

outputs.title: Powerlifting at any age: your fountain of health? With Dan van den Hoek
outputs.description: Podcast discussion on powerlifting, health, ageing, strength training, and strength sports research.

outputs.title: Saturday 7th September 2024: Dr Dan van den Hoek
outputs.description: Live radio discussion on Paralympic sport, classification, medal hopes, and challenges facing Paralympic athletes.

outputs.title: A guide to strength training and powerlifting
outputs.description: Public-facing article introducing strength training, powerlifting, health benefits, and safe participation.

outputs.title: Transform your life with powerlifting and strength training
outputs.source: Exercise and Sports Science Australia (ESSA) / Exercise Right
outputs.description: Activate magazine article co-authored with Christopher Latella on powerlifting, strength training, health, and inclusion.

outputs.title: Your body can be a portable gym: how to ditch membership fees and expensive equipment
outputs.description: Accessible commentary on bodyweight exercise and practical, low-cost approaches to strength training.

outputs.title: Do it with your eyes closed: how Formula 1 drivers memorise race tracks before even stepping foot on them
outputs.description: Public commentary on memory, preparation, and cognitive demands in Formula 1 racing.

outputs.title: After being wowed by Olympic athletes in Paris, it’s time to take notice of exceptional Paralympic exploits
outputs.description: Commentary highlighting Paralympic performance and the need for public attention beyond the Olympic Games.

outputs.title: What challenges do Paralympic athletes face compared to their Olympic peers?
outputs.description: Public commentary on accessibility, equity, and performance challenges in Paralympic sport.

outputs.title: What happens to F1 drivers’ bodies, and what sort of training do they do?
outputs.description: Public commentary on the physiology, training, and performance demands of Formula 1 drivers.

outputs.title: 3 reasons why Paralympic powerlifters shift seemingly impossible weights
outputs.description: Commentary explaining the performance of Paralympic powerlifters for a general audience.
